title: AnimaBossBar
description: Make your own BossBar with this plugin!
body:
![BossBar-Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec5762d21033ed696f7ceecbf792f2ac35f686a8_0.webp)
![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4d9b1977a1110f8dd076f7d4b2c3cc081567018_0.webp)
Bring your server to life with fully customizable, animated BossBars and timed chat messages!
Perfect for server announcements, tips, events, or just adding some flair to your community.

What is AnimaBossBar?
AnimaBossBar is a fully customizable BossBar & Chat Message plugin for Minecraft servers.
It lets you display animated progress bars and timed chat announcements to your players — with colors, animations, and PlaceholderAPI support.

Perfect for announcements, countdowns, tips, and more!

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d63a549710d7c7f5c0cd6d28d834cb1dbce3e4_0.webp)
✨ **Features**
- Multiple BossBars – Create as many as you want, each with its own message, style, color, and behavior.
- Animations – Progress bars that can decrease, loop, bounce, or stay static.
- Chained Bars – Automatically switch to the next BossBar after one finishes.
- Timed Chat Messages – Send recurring messages to players at configurable intervals.
- Per-World Control – Disable specific bars or messages in certain worlds.
- Audience Targeting – Send bars/messages to everyone, specific permissions, or selected players.
- PlaceholderAPI Support – Show player names, statistics, and any placeholder in your messages.
- Auto Attach – BossBars can automatically show to players when they join.

**Perfect For:**
- Announcing events
- Rotating tips for new players
- Showing countdowns for minigames
- Making your server feel more alive and dynamic
  
If you want placeholders you need:
[PlaceHoldersAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)

**Tutorial NL/BE:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TU4yknzXva0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4e32162b88bc0db071202f617bb5b9434e40a79_0.webp)
- bb.use

Commands
- /bbp reload – Reload configuration
- /bbp show <id> [player] – Show a BossBar to a player or everyone
- /bbp hide <id> [player] – Hide a BossBar from a player or everyone

![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e34e39986a954411d84e4475551b0362cccfd1fc_0.webp)
For questions or updates you can join the discord server. [Join the discord](https://discord.gg/Sh3tCRn)

How to install?
1. Stop your server and download the plugin!
2. Put the AnimaBossBar plugin in your folder and start your server!
3. Now you can use the plugin!

![Terms Of Service](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de9876075374cf94a9cbdd147011e9b7116b5506_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Terms Of Service</summary>

By downloading this plugin or downloading new versions you accept the following terms of use:

- ➤ You are aware of that BossBar-Plugin is meant to run ONLY on Minecraft servers.
- ➤ You are NOT allowed to POST this plugin on any website!
- ➤ You cannot claim the plugin belongs to you!
